Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, where healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; near the coffee station, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks, where healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while career counselors also remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and at the entrance event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, where healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and various stations are active.

A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, healthcare providers also showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.
